caption:
There's no shortcut to the quiet places. You put skins on, you walk, and the forest goes silent around you — just the creak of bindings and snow landing on your hood.

These are from a storm day last season, skinning through the birch forest in Daisetsuzan. No lift line, no music, no crowds. Then you rip the skins off, and the way down takes whatever breath the climb left you.

Send us a message if you want to earn some turns with us next winter.

#backcountryskiing #skitouring #splitboarding #japow #hokkaido #blackandwhite #japanskiing
